mentions.note: Wave season crushes: 2/3 booked for 2026 at higher prices; AI yield management and loyalty program driving demand; river expansion, Discovery class ship upside; market paying below intrinsic value.
Cruise line down 2.9%; 'long on money, short on time' consumer thesis weakening; vacation spending slowing.
Traders speculate on Iran peace rumors causing oil-driven volatility; Cramer warns this is pure guessing without edge, not investing; avoid endless on/off trading based on geopolitical noise.
